reasoning:
The UP trend with slope +0.2310, combined with z-score of +0.874 and 30-day AvgTone of 1.693, establishes a moderately positive baseline. Two recent inflection points (z=+3.20 and z=+3.08) in media coverage volume demonstrate surging attention. Goldstein scale of 1.952 and 68% Verbal Cooperation classification confirm constructive narrative framing. Negative momentum of -0.1037 introduces minor deceleration risk but insufficient to reverse overall positive trajectory given current signal strength and media volume acceleration.

Rationale: AvgTone current z-score of +0.874 indicates moderately positive sentiment above baseline. 30-day mean tone of 1.693 reflects mild positive coverage environment. Trend direction is UP with slope +0.2310, though strength is weak at 0.16/1.0. Recent 7-day tone of 1.576 shows +0.421 improvement vs prior week. Two major inflection points on 2026-04-22 (z=+3.20) and 2026-04-14 (z=+3.08) in num_sources signal surging media attention. Goldstein scale mean of 1.952 indicates net cooperative event framing. 68% Verbal Cooperation dominance vs 23% Verbal Conflict suggests positive narrative momentum. Negative momentum of -0.1037 indicates deceleration but not reversal. Combined signals point to 65-70% probability range.

consequences.consequence: By June 2026, Dhurandher 2 production studios will secure 3-4 additional international distribution deals worth $15-22 million, expanding theatrical footprint across Southeast Asian markets including Indonesia, Malaysia, and Thailand
By July 2026, Dangal franchise investors will redirect $8-12 million in planned sequel funding toward alternative sports drama projects, causing 18-24 month delay in Dangal 3 pre-production timeline

By August 2026, Indian film industry trade publications will report 12-15% increase in sports biopic greenlight approvals by major studios, citing Dhurandher 2 box office performance as validation of genre viability

key_indicators: Daily box office gross differential between Dhurandher 2 and Dangal's equivalent release period (days 1-30), measured in INR crores with 10% threshold as critical marker
Number of distinct news sources covering Dhurandher 2 performance weekly - sustained z-score above +2.0 indicates continued media momentum validating commercial success narrative
AvgTone trajectory for entertainment industry coverage in South Asian markets - decline below 0.0 within 14 days would signal negative sentiment shift threatening box office sustainability

scenarios.label: Accelerated
scenarios.description: Dhurandher 2 achieves breakout success exceeding Dangal's lifetime gross by 25-30% within first 4 weeks, driven by viral social media campaigns and cross-demographic appeal. International markets contribute 40% of total revenue versus projected 28%.
scenarios.key_trigger: Positive critical reviews from top-tier international film festivals combined with celebrity endorsement wave in first 10 days of release

scenarios.label: Base Case
scenarios.description: Dhurandher 2 surpasses Dangal's total box office by 8-12% through sustained 6-week theatrical run, capturing younger urban demographics while maintaining strong performance in tier-2 cities. Streaming rights sell for 15% premium over initial projections.
scenarios.key_trigger: Steady week-over-week box office retention of 55-65% with positive word-of-mouth maintaining momentum through May 2026

scenarios.label: Reversal
scenarios.description: Dhurandher 2 underperforms Dangal by 15-20%, facing unexpected competition from concurrent major releases and mixed critical reception. Second-weekend drop exceeds 60%, limiting total theatrical window to 4 weeks.
scenarios.key_trigger: Negative audience reception to key plot elements or production quality issues amplified through social media, combined with stronger-than-expected competing film releases
